mapper.insert: insert into refund_requests (order_type, order_id, order_no, applicant_id, refund_amount, reason, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderType}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{applicantId}, #{refundAmount}, #{reason}, 0, now(), now())
mapper.update: update refund_requests set status = #{status}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, handle_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
